title: XGBoost and fast-path updates
summary:
This week I worked on the Glassbox fast-path pipeline. I added a post-processing step using SymPy to simplify formulas. I also added a guardrail for large expressions so the code does not time out. It feels much cleaner now that I removed the old A/B strategy code paths.

I also switched the classifier to XGBoost. The old MLP was causing problems with Z-score logic. I tightened the feature clipping bounds from 50 to 5. This stopped the model weights from shrinking to zero. I also fixed a ZeroDivisionError in the fast-path when computing basis terms. Everything is updated in the README and docs now.
commitMessages: feat(docs): update README with optimized fast-path features and post-processing details
feat(sr): optimize fast-path pipeline, simplify formulas, and streamline ONN skill docs
feat: implement XGBoost curve classifier and fix adversarial bounds
